install.body: Add it to your home screen to get in faster.
install.iosGuide: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

mobile.title: Mobile — client app (F2)
mobile.hint: ScreenHead · BottomNav (account/case) · BottomSheet · Confetti · Tutorial · SignaturePad · FABs (DOC-01 §5.2). Switch to «Surface: Client» above.
mobile.screenHeadSub: Everything we can do for your family.
mobile.sheetBody: It's a process that helps minors under court protection regularize their status. We explain it in plain language.
mobile.tutorialB1: Tap «Continue» to upload your documents. I'll guide you every step.
mobile.tutorialB2: Every time you finish something, we celebrate together.
mobile.tutorialB3: If you have questions, tap «Your team» at the bottom left.

welcome.title: Welcome to your portal
welcome.subtitle: Follow your case step by step, with your team always close by.

noAccess.title: Let's talk first
noAccess.body: We activate your portal access once you start your case with us. Reach out and we'll give you your login details.

website.title: See our services
website.sub: Everything we do for your family

phone.title: Enter with your phone
phone.body: Use the same number you used for your contract. We already have it on file — that's your key to your case.
phone.trustBadge: We recognize your number and open your case instantly.
phone.footerBadge: Only you can see your case.
phone.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
phone.errorInvalidPhone: The phone number is not valid. Please check and try again.
phone.errorNoAccess: We couldn't find a case with that number. Please check and try again.
phone.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.subtitle: Here are your active cases.
home.noCases: You have no active cases at this time.
home.lockedLabel: Your case unlocks once these steps are complete

servicios.title: Our services
servicios.subtitle: Choose your process. Clear prices, no surprises.

servicioDetalle.whatIsFallback: It is a process that helps you regularize your situation safely. We explain everything in plain language, no complicated words.
servicioDetalle.planSelfNote: You complete your application with our step-by-step guidance.
servicioDetalle.planWithLawyerNote: A lawyer reviews your application before you submit it.
servicioDetalle.howIntro: You complete your own process; we only guide you to use the platform, step by step. We are not a law firm and we do not provide legal representation.
servicioDetalle.how1: You fill out your forms — the platform guides you on every field.
servicioDetalle.how2: You gather and upload your documents — we tell you exactly which ones.
servicioDetalle.how3: You submit your application — we support you along the way.
servicioDetalle.whatsappMessage: Hi, I saw the «{service}» service in the X Legal app and I'd like more info to get started.

disclaimer.title: Welcome and consent
disclaimer.subtitle: Read this notice to the end and sign to open your case.
disclaimer.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to continue

section1.title: 1. How we work
section1.body: At UsaLatinoPrime we are a technology and administrative services company. We support you: we organize and prepare your documents, help you with translations, and teach you to use the platform so you carry your own process in an orderly, secure way.

section2.title: 2. We are not attorneys
section2.body: To be transparent with you: we are not attorneys and we do not give legal advice. Decisions about your case are always yours, and at any time you have the right to consult a licensed attorney if you wish. We are here for the administrative and technological part.

section3.title: 3. Your information
section3.body: We work with the information and documents you share with us. By continuing, you confirm that this information is yours and true, and you authorize us to use it solely to organize and prepare your processes. That is why we always ask you to review your documents before signing them.

section4.title: 4. Timelines and decisions
section4.body: The decisions and timelines of each process depend solely on the government authorities (such as USCIS or the courts), not on us. What we do guarantee is our commitment, order and support at every step.

section5.title: 5. Privacy and payments
section5.body: Your information is stored securely and used only to manage your case. Fees and the payment plan are governed by your contract; official government fees are non-refundable once filed.

disclaimer.closing: I confirm that this information was explained to me and I understood it, and I agree to continue freely and voluntarily to open my case in the portal.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept this consent. My signature is valid to open my case.
disclaimer.errGeneric: We couldn't save your signature. Try again, no rush.

camino.nextDocsBody: Scan them into a clear, complete PDF. Quick and secure.
camino.nextFormBody: Answer a few questions in your own words.

tutorial.step1Body: Tap “Continue” to upload your documents. I'll guide you every step — don't worry.
tutorial.step2Body: Every time you finish something, we celebrate together. You'll see your case move forward.
tutorial.step3Body: If you have questions, tap “Your team” at the bottom left. Real people reply whenever you need.

documentos.title: My Documents
documentos.subtitle: Upload the ones for your {phase} phase. Scanned, sharp and complete.
documentos.tip: Tip: scan with good light so it reads clearly. Lex shows you how.
documentos.emptyBody: Your team is preparing your case. We'll let you know as soon as there's something for you.

subir.captureSub: Scan it with good light and upload it. It must look sharp and complete.
subir.uploadingSub: One moment, we're saving it securely.
subir.errFormat: We only accept a scanned {format}. Please try again with a {format}.
subir.errTooBig: The file is too large. Try a smaller one.
subir.errNetwork: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
subir.blurMsg: Your document looks blurry. Improve it: rescan it with good light, make sure it's readable, and upload it again.
subir.analyzingSub: We're reading the information. This takes a few seconds.
subir.reviewTitle: Here's what we read from your document
subir.reviewSub: Review the information. You can correct it later in the form.
subir.reviewEmpty: We couldn't find any data to show.
subir.reviewFailedSub: Don't worry — your team will review it. You can continue.

corregir.reasonFallback: It looks blurry. Please rescan it.

catalog.title: Service catalog
catalog.sub: What your business sells, as configuration — never as code.
catalog.emptySub: Create your first service and sell it today — no developers.
catalog.bannerProd: You're editing a live service: text changes are reflected immediately in the client app.
catalog.archiveConfirmBody: The service will no longer be contractable and will be hidden from the editor. Ongoing cases are unaffected.
catalog.translationStepSub: The translator's signature and name stamped on every translation for this service.
catalog.translationStepNote: The signature and name are the same for every client of this service. They are applied when a document translation is generated.
catalog.translationDrop: Click to upload the signature image
catalog.translationImageHint: A transparent-background PNG is recommended. It is stamped on the PDF's signature line.
catalog.translationImageType: Only PNG or JPG images are allowed.
catalog.translationImageUploaded: Signature uploaded. It will be saved when you continue.
catalog.translationSaveServiceFirst: Save the service basics before uploading the signature.
catalog.contractStepSub: The formal text specific to this service that the client will see and sign.
catalog.contractStepNote: Standard clauses (costs, nature, obligations, cancellation, signatures) and THE CONSULTANT data are applied automatically. Here you define only what is specific to the service.
catalog.contractScopeHint: One stage per line. They are numbered automatically in the contract.
catalog.partiesSub: Define who takes part in the case, besides the applicant.
catalog.partiesApplicantNote: The applicant is always included automatically.
catalog.partiesEmpty: No additional parties yet. The case will only have the applicant.
catalog.partyDup: That party type is already defined.
catalog.docPartyRolesLabel: Which party is it requested from?
catalog.docNeedRoles: Choose at least one party this document is requested from.
catalog.slugLocked: The identifier cannot change: cases already exist for this service.
catalog.entryToggle: It's an entry to another service's phase
catalog.entryNote: The entry service has its own phases, documents, forms and prices — independent of the parent.
catalog.lawyerNote: Automatically enables the legal validation flow for cases that contract it.
catalog.priceNote: Changing the price doesn't affect already signed contracts.
catalog.milestonesHelp: Client-visible progress steps. The week sets the order and the «Week N» label.
catalog.apptNote: It's the default for new cases; each case can have its own override.
catalog.objectivePh: E.g. Welcome the client and explain the process
catalog.cronogramaTotal: Estimated expediente delivery: week {n} from case start.
catalog.stageSlaSub: Days each owner has to finish their stage. They show as a countdown on their board; the total is the estimate to deliver the expediente to the client.
catalog.docSchemaModalNote: Changing the schema does not re-process past extractions; you can re-run them from each case.
catalog.docSchemaEmpty: No fields yet. Write the schema or use "Propose with AI".
catalog.docSchemaMapHint: Then, in Forms, connect each form field to one of these data points.
catalog.formStubSub: The form editor (official PDF and AI generation) arrives in phase F4.
catalog.celebrate: 🎉 {service} is now live. Clients see it in the app and Vanessa can create contracts — no deploy needed.
catalog.ackWarning: I understand and want to publish anyway
catalog.formsNeedPhaseSub: Save the service and add at least one phase so you can create forms in it.
catalog.formsKindLetterHint: AI drafts a legal document (letter, declaration) from a prompt, documents and datasets.
catalog.formsKindPdfHint: Upload an official PDF (AcroForm) and AI proposes the questions the client answers to fill it.
catalog.formsEmpty: No forms in this phase yet.
catalog.formsRequiresDocsHint: When on, the client cannot fill this form until 100% of their documents are uploaded. Turn off to exempt it (e.g. an intake survey).

employees.title: Employees
employees.sub: Your team and what each person can see and do.
employees.emptySub: Create your first employee and invite them to the panel.

employees.presetSales: Access to leads, calendar, clients and sales metrics.
employees.presetParalegal: Access to cases, case files, validations and calendar.
employees.presetFinance: Access to payments, collections, accounting and printing.
employees.inviteSent: Invitation sent to {email}. The employee will set their password from the email.
employees.matrixHeader: Roles are a starting point, not a limit: you can grant any employee any module.
employees.adminRowNote: Administrators have full access; the matrix doesn't apply to them.
employees.savedToast: Permissions updated. The effect is immediate: the employee's tabs appear or disappear on their next load.
employees.revokeCasesWarn: Their assigned cases will be inaccessible to them until reassigned.
employees.deactivateBody: Access is cut off immediately; history is preserved.
employees.reactivateBody: The employee will be able to log in again with the same permissions.

audit.title: Audit

audit.encryptedNote: Encrypted fields are never shown in plain text.
audit.viewEntityHistory: View full history of this entity
audit.emptyTitle: Every team action will be recorded here

config.title: Settings
config.sub: Your organization's data, in one place.
config.generalNote: These values feed the app footer, email templates and contact screens — nothing is hardcoded.

config.coverEditNote: Editing a template doesn't alter already generated cover sheets.
config.termsImmutable: Accepted versions are immutable: a new version is created.
config.termsEmptySub: Create the first version of your terms and conditions.

caseTabs.title: Case tabs by role
caseTabs.sub: Choose which case-file tabs each role can see. Tab order and the case-state locking stay fixed.
caseTabs.lockedNote: Marked tabs lock automatically until the case is active (signature + down payment).
caseTabs.conditionalNote: Some tabs only appear when the case requires them (validation, prior phases, pre-mortem).

casos.title: Cases
casos.emptySub: Cases are created when Vanessa converts a lead and the client signs.

casos.existingDataHint: Client profile data. Only the address is editable; corrections update the profile.
casos.payHint: Adjust the price, down payment and number of installments for this contract (e.g. a promotion). It is frozen into the contract.

casos.payWeeklyPreview: Balance in {count} weekly installments of {amount} each.
casos.clientEmailHint: Contact info and internal identity. The client signs in with their phone only.
casos.phoneHint: This is their login credential: the client signs in with this number. We normalize it to international format (+1).
casos.addressHint: US address. Used to prefill their forms (I-589).
casos.partyOnlyApplicant: This service only has the applicant.
casos.linkBody: Share this link with the client so they can sign their contract.

detail.adminBar: Administrator mode — you have full powers over this case. All your actions are audited.
detail.consentPending: The client has not signed the consent yet.
detail.bannerPaymentPending: Awaiting the down payment — the case will activate once the payment is confirmed.
detail.bannerNoPhase: This case hasn't started its first phase yet.
detail.lockedTabHint: Available once the case is active — the contract signature or the down payment confirmation is still pending.
detail.registerPaymentBody: Confirming the down payment activates the case.

detail.zelleRejectReasonLabel: Rejection reason (the client will see it) *

detail.rejectNote: The client will see this reason in their language.
detail.previewError: The document preview could not be loaded.
detail.translateIntro: AI will translate this document (Spanish → English) and generate an English PDF to assemble the court expediente.

detail.translateError: The document could not be translated.
detail.partiesEmpty: This case has no registered parties yet.
detail.tabStubSub: This section arrives in a future phase.

notes.title: Case notes
notes.subtitle: General notes (visible to the client), team notes (staff only) and personal notes (only you).

fasesAnteriores.sub: Documents and forms from phases the case has already completed (read-only).

preMortem.sub: Validate a generation or automation against its filling guide, the case context, and official examples.

preMortem.notValidatable: Generate this document first to validate it.
preMortem.empty: Select a document and run the validation to review its quality before filing.

detail.historialSub: Auditable record of every case action.
detail.formsEmpty: No forms for this phase yet.
detail.toastPdfBlockedApproval: Approve the form before generating the PDF.
detail.toastPdfError: Couldn't generate the PDF. Please try again.

detail.traspasoSub: Confirm everything is ready before handing off the case.

detail.advancePhaseBlocked: Print the expediente to enable the phase advance.
detail.advancePhaseConfirmBody: The current phase will be closed and the case will return to Sales to start the next phase. If this is the last phase, the case will be completed. This action is recorded.
detail.advancePhaseOwnerHint: There are several sales reps. Choose who receives the case in the new phase.
detail.advancePhaseToastAdvanced: Case advanced to the next phase.
detail.advancePhaseToastCompleted: Case completed! Thank you for trusting us.

detail.genEmpty: No generations for this case yet.

leads.lexTipHtml: I see {n} uncontacted leads in "New". When you move one to Ready for contract (or click "Create case"), I generate the contract instantly.

manageCats.empty: No categories yet. Create the first one below.

citas.title: Appointments
citas.sub: Week of {range} · own your agenda and each client's progress.
citas.completeModalSub: Mark which objectives were achieved. It will be saved to the case.
citas.noObjectives: No objectives defined for this appointment.
citas.cancelModalSub: The client will be notified and the slot freed. Provide a cancellation reason.
citas.cancelReasonPh: E.g. The client requested another date…
citas.noShowModalSub: The client did not show up. This applies a 7-day rebooking block.
citas.completeNotStartedWarn: This appointment hasn't started yet. You'll be able to complete it once its time arrives.
citas.errApptNotStarted: You can't complete an appointment that hasn't started yet.
citas.errApptInvalidTransition: This appointment can no longer be changed (its status changed).
citas.errGeneric: The action couldn't be completed. Please try again.
citas.lexC2: Lex: Remember to generate the letters before finishing.

nuevaCita.title: New appointment
nuevaCita.sub: Schedule it in seconds, linked to the right case or lead
nuevaCita.clientHint: Person with an active case (signed contract).
nuevaCita.emptyClients: No clients with an active case. Try another name or use "Prospect".
nuevaCita.emptyProspects: No prospects. Create a new one below.
nuevaCita.pickCaseFirst: Select a case to see available times.
nuevaCita.noSlots: No available times in the coming weeks.
nuevaCita.overlapWarn: This time overlaps another scheduled appointment. Create anyway?
nuevaCita.outsideWarn: This time is outside your availability. Create anyway?

disponibilidad.title: My availability
disponibilidad.sub: What you open here is what your clients can book.
disponibilidad.lexTipHtml: Your clients see these hours in their own timezone automatically. Tip: leave at least 2 blocks per day.
disponibilidad.autoRemindersSub: 1 day and 1 hour before the appointment
disponibilidad.noShowNotice: No-show penalty: the client cannot rebook for {days} days.
disponibilidad.blockInvalidRange: The end date must be after the start date.
disponibilidad.blockAffectsConfirm: This block affects {n} scheduled appointment(s). Create anyway?

clientes.title: My clients
clientes.sub: Each row is a case (1 contract = 1 case). A client may have several.
clientes.lexTipHtml: {name} has everything complete and is ready to hand off to Diana.
clientes.empty: No clients in the system yet.
clientes.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, case number or phone…
clientes.soonTab: This section will be available soon.

metricas.title: Metrics
metricas.sub: Your performance and funnel status, in plain language.
metricas.lexTipHtml: Good progress: your conversion rose to {conv}. The biggest leak is Contacted → Appointment scheduled.

config.title: Settings
config.sub: Your account, theme and panel preferences.
config.name: Vanessa Ríos
config.lexBubblesSub: Lex suggests the next action on each screen

lex.greetMiDia: Good morning, Vanessa ✨ You have {n} new leads to contact. Shall we start with the hottest one?
lex.greetLeads: You're on the board. I found {n} leads uncontacted in "New". Want me to prioritize them by age?
lex.greetCitas: Today you have {n} appointments. I'll remind you to prep the ones that need it.
lex.greetMetricas: Your Lead→Contract conversion is {conv}. The bottleneck is "Appointment scheduled". Shall we review it?
lex.greetClientes: You have {n} clients in progress. {name} is ready to hand off to Diana.
lex.greetDisponibilidad: Your clients see your agenda in their own timezone. This week you have {n} bookable open slots.
lex.greetConfig: Here you tune your account, theme and my presence. Want me to turn on dark mode for long sessions?
lex.qHowManySlots: How many slots do I have?
lex.aGeneric: I review it on your real data and flag the next best action.

preview.title: Vanessa Panel — preview
preview.notice: Development view with sample data (no session).

kanban.title: My cases
kanban.moveError: Couldn't move the card. Try again.
kanban.delModalBodyEmpty: The column is empty. It will be deleted with no cards to move.
kanban.delModalBodyCards: The column has {n} cards. Select where to move them.
kanban.delLastColumn: The board needs at least one column
kanban.emptyBody: Henry will assign your first one soon.

miDia.emptyPendientes: Nothing pending right now. Great job!
miDia.emptyTasks: You have no personal tasks yet.

metricas.title: My metrics
metricas.sub: Your legal performance for the selected period.

porRevisar.title: My cases
porRevisar.sub: {m, plural, one {# case assigned to you} other {# cases assigned to you}} · {n, plural, one {# document to review} other {# documents to review}}
porRevisar.empty: You have no assigned cases yet. When Sales hands off a case, it shows up here.

expedienteIndex.title: Expedientes
expedienteIndex.sub: {n, plural, one {# expediente in progress} other {# expedientes in progress}}
expedienteIndex.empty: You have no expedientes in progress.

resumen.title: Finance overview
resumen.sub: Income, overdue and operations for the period.

cobranza.title: Collections
cobranza.moveError: Could not move the card. Try again.
cobranza.delModalBodyEmpty: The column is empty. It will be deleted with no cards to move.
cobranza.delModalBodyCards: The column has {n} cards. Select where to move them.
cobranza.delMigrateLabel: Move the cards to another column before deleting
cobranza.delLastColumn: The board needs at least one column
cobranza.delSeedWarning: Automatic cards use this column; if you rename it they will fall to the entry column
cobranza.emptyBody: Collection cards will appear automatically when a contract is signed.

impresion.title: Print queue
impresion.confirmPrintedBody: Henry will be notified to move the case forward.
impresion.emptyBody: Nothing to print. Diana will let you know when a case file is ready.
impresion.toastPrinted: ✓ Case file printed · Henry was notified
impresion.toastError: An error occurred. Please try again.
impresion.confirmAdvanceBody: The case will restart the cycle: it goes back to the sales team to set up the new phase. Only do this once this phase's expediente is printed.
impresion.advanceOwnerHint: Several sales reps are eligible. Pick who receives the case in the new phase.
impresion.toastAdvanced: The case advanced to the next phase.

pagos.title: Payments & installments
pagos.gateSub: The case can't start without this payment
pagos.calendarEmpty: No due installments in this range.
pagos.overdueEmpty: No overdue installments. Portfolio up to date.
pagos.reconciliationBody: Global payment reconciliation will be available in the next wave. In the meantime, review payments case by case in the account statement.
pagos.rejectionReason: Rejection reason (the client will see it)
pagos.rejectionWarning: The client will receive this reason to correct and re-upload their proof.
pagos.waiveWarning: The installment will be removed from collections; this action cannot be undone.
pagos.waiveAdminOnly: Only the Admin can waive the down payment of a case that hasn't started.
pagos.rescheduleWarning: If it was overdue, it will return to Pending.
pagos.stripeModalBody: The client will receive the link to pay from their app. The installment will move to Processing.
pagos.stripeSuccessTitle: Payment link sent to the client
pagos.stripeSuccessBody: The client will receive the link in their app. You can also copy it to resend it.
pagos.stripePaymentInProgress: There is already an active charge for this installment.
pagos.progressInvariant: Paid + pending + overdue + waived = plan total
pagos.noPlanBanner: Contract without payment plan — payment actions are blocked.
pagos.loadError: Could not load the account statement.
pagos.toastStripeSuccess: Payment link generated and sent to the client.
pagos.toastZelleRejected: Proof rejected. The client will be notified.
pagos.errorPaymentInProgress: There is already an active charge for this installment.
pagos.errorNotPayable: This installment cannot be charged in its current state.
pagos.errorWaiveAdmin: Only the Admin can waive the down payment of a case that hasn't started.
pagos.errorWaiveReason: A reason is required to waive.
pagos.errorPaymentNotPending: The payment was already verified (state refreshed).
pagos.errorAmountMismatch: Amount mismatch (no partial payments in V2).
pagos.errorDueDateInvalid: The date must be in the future.
pagos.errorNotImplemented: This action will be available soon.

publicSigning.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to continue
publicSigning.accept: I have read the contract and accept its terms. My signature is valid to execute it.
publicSigning.errorBanner: We couldn't record your signature. Please try again.
publicSigning.unavailableTitle: This link is no longer available
publicSigning.unavailableBody: Contact your advisor to receive a new one.
publicSigning.successBody: You'll receive access to your app once your first payment is confirmed.

staff_validaciones.pageSubtitle: All case files sent for attorney review.
staff_validaciones.emptyBody: When a case file is sent for attorney review it will appear here.
staff_validaciones.bannerNoEdit: The case file cannot be edited during validation.
staff_validaciones.compileLinkLabel: Compile the case file to send it
staff_validaciones.validatedTitle: The attorney validated the case file (attempt {n})
staff_validaciones.returnedTitle: The attorney returned attempt {n} with {count} finding
staff_validaciones.returnedTitlePlural: The attorney returned attempt {n} with {count} findings
staff_validaciones.clientBanner: Part of the correction depends on the client: request the re-upload (RFE) or data by message.
staff_validaciones.modalBody: Attempt {next} will be created by cloning items from attempt {current}. Attempt {current} is frozen as history.
staff_validaciones.noValidationsBody: The case file is compiled and ready to send.
staff_validaciones.noValidationsBodyNoExp: First compile the case file to send it to the attorney.
staff_validaciones.errorFallback: The SaaS returned an error. Check the configuration.
staff_validaciones.reasonActiveValidation: There is already an active validation
staff_validaciones.noCompiledToast: There is no compiled case file for this case.
staff_validaciones.sentToLawyerToast: Case file sent to the attorney.
staff_validaciones.sentToPrintNote: The case file is in Andrium's print queue.
staff_validaciones.errPlanNotWithLawyer: This case has no plan with an attorney.
staff_validaciones.errExpedienteNotCompiled: The case file is not compiled.
staff_validaciones.errValidationAlreadyActive: There is already an active validation for this case.
staff_validaciones.errAbogadosApiError: Error communicating with the SaaS. Try again.
staff_validaciones.errAbogadosApiBadRequest: The submitted data is invalid. Review the case file.
staff_validaciones.errExpedienteNotEditable: The case file is no longer editable.
staff_validaciones.errExpedienteNotApproved: The attorney has not validated this case file yet.
staff_validaciones.errExpedienteAlreadySentToFinance: This case file was already sent to printing.

staff_ensamblador.pageSubtitle: Add material, order the pieces, generate the cover, and compile everything into a PDF.
staff_ensamblador.emptyTitle: This case has no case file yet
staff_ensamblador.emptyBody: Create the first draft to start assembling the case file.
staff_ensamblador.title: Case file
staff_ensamblador.noCoverTemplates: There are no cover templates. The administrator must create them.
staff_ensamblador.reviewDocSelect: Pick a document to compare it against the form.
staff_ensamblador.reviewNoDocs: This case has no client documents.
staff_ensamblador.reviewHint: Compare the document (left) with the autocompleted data. Fix anything missing and approve.
staff_ensamblador.reviewRejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain to the client what to fix…
staff_ensamblador.reviewRejectedToast: Form returned to the client for correction
staff_ensamblador.reviewRejectReasonRequired: Write a reason for the client.
staff_ensamblador.letterEmpty: The letter hasn't been generated yet. Edit the answers and click "Regenerate letter".
staff_ensamblador.reviewOfficialEmpty: The official PDF hasn't been generated yet. Review the answers and approve to generate it.
staff_ensamblador.aiAssembleHint: AI reads the case documents and assembles the file: covers per key document and per party (with their translations), in order. You can then review and adjust it.
staff_ensamblador.aiReplaceConfirm: This will replace the current draft of the case file and rebuild it with AI. Continue?
staff_ensamblador.aiAssembledToast: Case file assembled with AI: {n} covers
staff_ensamblador.aiAssembledWithUnresolvedToast: Case file assembled: {n} covers ({u} items unplaced — review them)
staff_ensamblador.coverDeleteConfirm: Remove this cover from the case file?
staff_ensamblador.formsEmpty: No forms with a generated PDF.
staff_ensamblador.orderEmpty: Add material from the left to assemble the case file.
staff_ensamblador.itemRemoveConfirm: Remove this item from the expediente? You can add it again from “Available material”.
staff_ensamblador.errCompileFailed: The case file couldn't be compiled.
staff_ensamblador.errNotEditable: The case file is no longer editable.
staff_ensamblador.errNotApproved: The lawyer hasn't validated the case file yet; it can't be sent to Andrium.
staff_ensamblador.errAlreadySent: The case file was already sent to Andrium.
staff_ensamblador.errNotEmpty: The case file already has items. Confirm to replace them.
staff_ensamblador.readyConfirm: Mark the case file as Ready? You can then hand off the case to send it.
